ref: One day, Joseph went to Potiphar's house to do his work, and none of the other servants were there.

ref: Shem and Japheth put a robe over their shoulders and walked backwards into the tent. Without looking at their father, they placed it over his body.

translated: And Shem and Japheth covered their father's body in the tent so as not to see his nakedness, for he was naked inside, and they went out saying, "Hurry!"

ref: At once his hand went back in, and the other child was born first. The woman then said, “What an opening you've made for yourself!” So they named the baby Perez.

translated: Ama went to look for his child, and he took his money to the market; and the town crier proclaimed, "The word has spread in the town!" Dinzuɣu arrived at the house of Perez.

translated: When Abraham said, "I have no son, and the heir of my house is this one," then God took him outside and said to him, "Look now at the heavens and count the stars, if you can. So shall your descendants be."

ref: Seven days later a flood began to cover the earth.

ref: One evening he was walking out in the fields, when suddenly he saw a group of people approaching on camels. So he started toward them. Rebekah saw him coming; she got down from her camel, and asked, “Who is that man?” “He is my master Isaac,” the servant answered. Then Rebekah covered her face with her veil.
text: ka bɔhi Ibrahimma nachin’ kpɛm’ maa, “Ka ŋuni n-lee be kpe ha palo ni n-chani tuhiri ti soli ŋɔ na?” Ka nachin’ kpɛm’ maa yɛl’ o, “N dana m-bala.” Ka Ribɛka daa zaŋ sariga pa n-lims’ o ninni.
translated: Abraham called his son Isaac and said, “Should I find a wife for you from my homeland?” Isaac responded, “I will go.” Then Rebecca came out of the tent to meet him.

ref: So the Lord God sent them out of the Garden of Eden, where they would have to work the ground from which the man had been made.

translated: Dinzuɣu and Yawɛ are Naawuni who was in the garden he made for them in Eden, and he gave them to eat from it, and they ate the forbidden fruit which was his commandment.

ref: The famine will be so bad that no one will remember that once there had been plenty.

text: A takɔb’ zuɣu ka a yɛn dira, ka jɛmd’ a tizo maa. Amaa a yi zaɣis’ amaŋ’ zuɣu, a ni yi o sulinsi ni.”

translated: He spoke in a parable, "I know the Creator who made you and gave you life. 'Whose face did you see? And your body, did you see its inside? And who did you see, the one who digs the grave or the one who will take you tomorrow?'"

text: Ka di daa niŋ zaawuni, di nyaaŋa ka biɛɣu neei; ka di niŋ dabisili din pah’ anu.

translated: And he gathered stones to prepare the way for his people against the enemy in the land of Moab. He was afraid because the Moabites came to the city in fear and hid there.

ref: Tamar found out that her father-in-law Judah was going to Timnah to shear his sheep.

ref: But they replied, “We can't do that until they all get here, and the rock has been rolled away from the well.”

translated: "If you want to live in this world, you must not lie to anyone, you must not steal someone's property or money, and you must not do anything bad."

ref: Jacob's other sons came and took everything they wanted. All this was done because of the horrible thing that had happened to their sister.
text: Ka Yaakubu bidib’ shɛb’ bɛn kpalim daa chaŋ ti kpe tiŋ’ maa puuni n-di nɛma bɛ tizɔpaɣ’ maa zuɣu.
translated: And Jacob blessed all his children, saying, "You are the one who will be blessed by all peoples, and your hand will be on the neck of your enemies, and your brothers will bow down to you."

translated: And when Yaakubu was about to die, he said, "My father Ibrahim and my brother Yisahaku served you, O Lord, and now you have said to me, 'Take your father's flock and go to the place where I will show you, and bring me game from there.'"

ref: Abram said, “All right! She's your slave—do whatever you want with her.” Then Sarai began treating Hagar so harshly that she finally ran away.

translated: Behold, I am a laughingstock; he will mock me. When I bear a son, will I give birth to him? Then Sarah went to Hagar her servant and she bore a son for him.
